gates.rationale: positive loop proof must still be green before any audit shortcut is accepted
green claim cannot survive any organization-audit drift
decision artifacts must remain schema-valid and reconstructable
human audit path should stay within the declared bounded-manual threshold

remaining_gap: Runtime alone is reconstructable by a human reviewer, but the audit process remains operationally expensive. Negative runtime traces now cover multiple broken-chain families, while broader audit automation and stronger cost reduction are still limited.
